wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Eduooz International Academy project overview. Explain the educational mission of providing premier healthcare coaching services for nursing, pharmacy, and laboratory technician examinations. Document the project's purpose as India's most advanced coaching platform for government and international healthcare placements. Include the target audience, core values, and positioning in the healthcare education market. Describe the technology stack including Three.js 3D graphics, GSAP animations, and modern frontend architecture. Provide an architectural overview showing how the interactive 3D animations, glass morphism design system, and responsive layout work together to create an immersive educational experience. Include the project's commitment to excellence, precision coaching methodology, and proven placement results.

wiki_catalogs.name: Header Component
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz header component implementation. Detail the HTML structure including navigation menu, logo integration, and responsive design elements. Explain the active navigation highlighting mechanism that automatically detects the current page and applies active classes to matching menu items. Document the mobile navbar functionality including toggle behavior, overlay management, and automatic closing when links are clicked. Cover the base path detection system that ensures proper linking in subdirectory deployments. Include concrete examples of the header component's role in the overall page structure and its integration with the component loading system. Address the event listeners and DOM manipulation patterns used for dynamic behavior.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component System Design
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz component system architecture. Explain the modular HTML component design pattern, including the dynamic component loading mechanism implemented in components.js. Document the base path detection system for subdirectory support, active navigation highlighting functionality, and mobile navbar initialization. Detail the component lifecycle from static HTML files to dynamic DOM manipulation. Include the integration patterns between reusable components and main page content. Provide examples of component configuration objects, loading sequences, and error handling mechanisms. Address the benefits of this architecture for maintainability, reusability, and performance optimization.

wiki_catalogs.name: Introduction and Mission
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Eduooz International Academy introduction and mission statement. Explain the educational vision of becoming India's most advanced coaching platform for healthcare professionals preparing for government and international examinations. Document the academy's commitment to precision coaching methodology, proven placement results, and excellence in healthcare education. Describe the target audience including nursing students, pharmacist candidates, and laboratory technicians seeking career advancement. Include the academy's positioning in the competitive healthcare education market, emphasizing international recognition and licensing preparation (DHA, HAAD, NCLEX). Explain the educational philosophy centered on practical application, comprehensive preparation, and lifelong professional development in healthcare sectors.

wiki_catalogs.name: Faculty Profile System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz faculty profile system. Detail the faculty showcase implementation including expert faculty member presentations, international certification displays, and achievement highlighting mechanisms. Document the filmstrip carousel design for faculty members, prismatic card animations with hover effects, and responsive grid layout for different screen sizes. Explain the data structure requirements for faculty profiles including names, specializations, certifications, and international credentials. Include concrete examples of HTML markup for faculty cards, CSS styling for glass morphism effects, and JavaScript interactions for carousel functionality. Address the integration with three.js background elements and GSAP animations for entrance effects. Document the badge system for displaying faculty affiliations and achievements, along with the responsive design patterns for mobile optimization.

wiki_catalogs.name: Hero Section with 3D Animations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the hero section 3D animation implementation. Explain the Three.js scene setup including the cinematic canvas initialization, floating medical equipment objects (stethoscope, syringe, microscope), and animation loops. Document the GSAP timeline management for hero animations including staggered reveal effects, magnetic button interactions, and scroll-triggered sequences. Detail the gradient mesh background system with blob animations and color transitions. Include technical implementation of the orbit container with interactive course nodes, mouse interaction handling, and responsive scaling. Address performance optimization techniques for 3D rendering, memory management, and cross-browser compatibility considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Course Organization and Filtering
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the course organization and filtering system. Explain the tab-based filtering mechanism with specialty categories including nursing, lab technician, pharmacist, and German language courses. Document the data-category attributes used for filtering, the JavaScript filtering logic implementation, and the responsive grid layout system. Detail the course card structure with image wrappers, content sections, and footer elements. Include examples of adding new course categories, modifying filter buttons, and implementing custom filtering criteria. Address the integration between HTML data attributes and JavaScript filtering functions, including performance optimization for large course catalogs.

wiki_catalogs.name: CSS Custom Properties System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz CSS custom properties system. Explain the theme management architecture using CSS variables for dark and light themes, including brand colors (--brand-dark, --brand-purple, --brand-magenta, --brand-cyan), text color schemes (--text-main, --text-muted), and background variations (--bg-light). Document the glass morphism property system (--glass-bg, --glass-border, --glass-light-bg) and their role in creating frosted panel effects throughout the application. Detail the typography system with --font-main variable and font family management. Include practical examples of how these properties cascade through the component system, enabling consistent theming across all pages. Explain the relationship between custom properties and runtime theme switching, providing code examples for extending the color palette and adding new theme variants.

wiki_catalogs.name: GSAP Timeline Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the GSAP timeline management system used throughout the Eduooz animation framework. Explain the construction and orchestration of complex animation sequences including the hero entrance timeline, course selection orbit, and section reveal animations. Document timeline chaining techniques, staggered animations, and timing control mechanisms. Include examples of timeline creation, animation sequencing, and performance optimization strategies. Detail the integration between different timeline phases and how they coordinate with user interactions. Provide guidance on timeline debugging, optimization techniques, and browser compatibility considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: YouTube API Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the YouTube API integration used in the Eduooz video carousel system. Explain the implementation of the YouTube Player API for embedding videos, playlist management, and video thumbnail handling. Document the JavaScript integration pattern including API initialization, video selection logic, and playlist navigation. Detail the video metadata extraction process, category filtering system, and responsive video player configuration. Include concrete examples of API endpoint usage, error handling strategies for network failures, and fallback mechanisms when YouTube services are unavailable. Address video player customization options, autoplay configuration, and mobile-responsive video display. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common integration issues including CORS restrictions, API quota limits, and video availability problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Three.js Scene Setup and Initialization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Three.js scene initialization and setup process. Detail the cinematic canvas configuration including WebGL renderer settings, anti-aliasing, pixel ratio optimization, and alpha channel handling. Explain the camera perspective setup with field-of-view calculations, aspect ratio handling, and position configurations. Document the scene fog system with exponential density settings and color choices. Cover the master floating group architecture for managing multiple 3D objects efficiently. Include performance optimization techniques such as device pixel ratio limiting, shadow mapping configuration, and memory management strategies. Address cross-browser compatibility considerations and fallback mechanisms.

wiki_catalogs.name: Nursing Courses Implementation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for nursing course implementations including DHA nursing licensure exams, HAAD nursing, NCLEX-RN preparation, and various state-level nursing exams. Document the extensive nursing course catalog structure, specialized exam preparation content, and international licensing focus. Explain the course organization for different nursing specialties including staff nurse positions, nursing tutors, and academic positions. Include examples of course descriptions, exam-specific preparation strategies, and international certification pathways. Detail the implementation of nursing-specific content delivery, mock test systems, and expert instructor coordination for comprehensive nursing exam preparation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Three.js Graphics Engine
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the Three.js 0.160.0 WebGL graphics engine implementation. Explain the 3D scene setup process, camera configuration, and rendering pipeline optimization. Document the healthcare-themed 3D object creation including floating medical equipment, animated particles, and interactive elements. Detail the animation loop management, performance optimization techniques, and memory management strategies. Include concrete examples of 3D object instantiation, material configuration, and lighting setup. Address responsive 3D rendering, device performance considerations, and graceful degradation for low-end devices. Provide guidance on extending the 3D scene, adding new interactive elements, and maintaining optimal frame rates across different hardware configurations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for the Eduooz website development environment. Document local development setup including Node.js requirements, browser compatibility, and development server configuration. Explain the build process using the clean_css.js script for CSS optimization and asset management. Provide step-by-step instructions for running the project locally, accessing different pages, and understanding the component-based architecture. Include prerequisites such as modern browsers with WebGL support for 3D animations, and guidance on troubleshooting common setup issues. Document the project structure, file organization, and how to navigate between different sections of the educational platform.

wiki_catalogs.name: Footer Component
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the Eduooz footer component functionality. Explain the newsletter subscription system including form handling and validation. Document the social media integration with external links and icons. Detail the contact information display and location-based services. Cover the scroll-to-top button implementation with smooth scrolling behavior and visibility conditions. Explain the footer loading workflow and event dispatching for component coordination. Include examples of the footer's responsive design elements and accessibility features. Address the integration with the global component system and how it contributes to the overall user experience.

wiki_catalogs.name: Animation Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Eduooz animation architecture powered by GSAP and scroll-triggered effects. Explain the timeline management system for hero animations, magnetic button interaction effects, and scroll-based animation triggers. Document the integration between GSAP timelines and Three.js 3D scenes. Detail the Lenis smooth scrolling optimization and its impact on animation performance. Include the CSS animation keyframes and transitions that complement the JavaScript-driven animations. Provide examples of animation sequencing, performance optimization techniques, and browser compatibility considerations. Address the coordination between page load animations, user interaction animations, and continuous background animations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Technology Stack Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Eduooz technology stack overview. Document the modern frontend architecture built with HTML5, CSS3, and ES6+ JavaScript. Explain the critical dependencies including Three.js 0.160.0 for WebGL 3D graphics, GSAP 3.12.5 for advanced animations, Lenis for smooth scrolling, Font Awesome 6.5.1 for vector icons, and Google Fonts for typography. Detail the build process using clean_css.js for CSS optimization and the component-based architecture. Describe how these technologies work together to create an immersive educational experience with interactive 3D animations, glass morphism UI design, and responsive mobile-first approach. Include browser compatibility requirements and performance optimization strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Placement Results Showcase
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the Eduooz placement results showcase system. Thoroughly explain the alumni network visualization including the cascading wall of excellence design, infinite scrolling effects, and column-based layout system. Document the live statistics dashboard with animated counters for countries reached, alumni placed, hiring partners, and placement rates. Detail the placement process explanation through the bento box grid system showcasing the career incubator methodology. Include concrete examples of the cascade animation implementation, marquee-style scrolling effects, and responsive design patterns. Explain the data structures for placement statistics, alumni achievements, and international placement tracking. Document the integration with GSAP timeline animations, magnetic button effects, and the overall visual hierarchy. Address the performance optimization techniques for smooth scrolling animations and the responsive breakpoints for different device sizes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Glass Morphism Design Elements
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the glass morphism design system implementation. Detail the frosted glass panel creation using backdrop-filter, border transparency effects, and gradient overlays. Explain the custom property system for consistent theming across all glass elements. Document the layered design approach with blur effects, border radii variations, and depth perception techniques. Include implementation of liquid overlays, shine effects, and interactive hover states. Address the responsive behavior of glass elements across different screen sizes and the performance implications of blur effects. Provide guidelines for extending the glass morphism system with new components.

wiki_catalogs.name: Specialty Course Implementations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for specialty-specific course implementations across nursing, pharmacy, laboratory technician, and German language programs. Document the course data structures, specialized content layouts, and unique features for each specialty. Explain the course listing patterns, detailed course descriptions, pricing information display, and enrollment call-to-action elements. Include examples of specialty-specific course variations, such as the comprehensive nursing exam preparation courses, pharmacist certification programs, and German language courses for healthcare professionals. Detail the implementation of specialty-specific navigation, course categorization, and content organization strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Glass Morphism Design Implementation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the glass morphism design system used throughout Eduooz. Thoroughly explain the implementation of frosted glass panels using backdrop-filter: blur() with rgba() transparency values, border styling with rgba() borders, and gradient overlays for depth perception. Document the specific glass property combinations: --glass-bg (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)), --glass-border (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)), --glass-light-bg (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)), and --glass-highlight gradients. Include concrete examples of glass card implementations, trust panels, and floating badges. Explain the performance considerations of backdrop-filter, browser compatibility matrix, and fallback strategies for older browsers. Detail the composability of glass effects with shadows, borders, and overlay gradients to create layered depth effects.

wiki_catalogs.name: Magnetic Button Effects
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the magnetic button interaction system that provides immersive hover effects. Detail the physics-based animation implementation including mouse tracking, position calculation, and smooth interpolation. Explain the requestAnimationFrame optimization, cancelation strategies, and performance considerations. Document the elastic easing functions, timing configurations, and responsive behavior across different screen sizes. Include implementation examples showing how to customize magnetic strength, animation duration, and easing curves. Address browser compatibility, fallback strategies, and accessibility considerations for reduced motion preferences.

wiki_catalogs.name: Font and Icon Libraries
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the font and icon library integrations used throughout the Eduooz website. Thoroughly explain the Google Fonts implementation including Plus Jakarta Sans and Cormorant Garamond font loading, typography hierarchy, and font optimization strategies. Document the Font Awesome 6.5.1 integration covering icon usage patterns, SVG optimization, and custom icon styling. Detail the font loading performance considerations, preloading strategies, and fallback font configurations. Include concrete examples of icon implementation across different components, typography scaling guidelines, and responsive font sizing. Address font licensing compliance, CDN usage best practices, and local font hosting alternatives. Provide guidance on extending the icon library, custom icon integration, and maintaining consistency across the design system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Floating Medical Equipment Objects
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the floating healthcare-themed 3D objects implementation. Explain the creation of four distinct medical objects: medical cross (nursing), pill capsule (pharmacy), test tube (lab technician), and stethoscope (nursing). Document the geometric construction process for each object including BoxGeometry, CylinderGeometry, SphereGeometry, and TorusGeometry usage. Detail the frosted glass material properties with transmission, metalness, roughness, and IOR settings. Cover the glowing accent materials with emissive properties and intensity controls. Include the modular object creation functions with parameterized scaling, shadow casting configurations, and positioning strategies. Address the floating elements array management and phase-based animation systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Pharmacy Courses Implementation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for pharmacist preparation courses including RRB pharmacist exams, drug inspector preparation, and pharmaceutical analysis programs. Document the pharmacy-specific course structure, expert-led preparation methodology, and comprehensive mock test systems. Explain the course organization for different pharmacy positions including clinical pharmacists, pharmaceutical analysts, and regulatory affairs specialists. Include examples of pharmacy-specific exam preparation strategies, drug-related content coverage, and professional certification pathways. Detail the implementation of pharmaceutical subject matter, regulatory exam preparation, and practical application training for pharmacist certification.

wiki_catalogs.name: GSAP Animation Library
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the GSAP 3.12.5 animation library integration. Explain timeline management, scroll-triggered animation setup, and magnetic button effect implementation. Document the animation sequencing patterns, easing functions, and performance optimization techniques. Detail the integration with scroll-based triggers, responsive animation scaling, and cross-browser compatibility considerations. Include concrete examples of timeline creation, animation chaining, and complex animation sequences. Address animation performance monitoring, memory cleanup, and browser-specific optimizations. Provide guidance on extending the animation system, creating custom animation effects, and maintaining smooth performance across different devices and screen sizes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Architecture Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create architectural documentation for the Eduooz website's component-based architecture. Describe the high-level design patterns including modular HTML components, dynamic loading mechanisms, and responsive layout systems. Document the integration of Three.js for 3D graphics, GSAP for animations, and the glass morphism design system. Explain the component interaction patterns between header, footer, and main content sections. Detail the animation-driven UI architecture with scroll-triggered effects and magnetic button interactions. Include the responsive design approach using CSS custom properties and media queries. Document the data flow from static content through component loading to dynamic animations, and explain how the system maintains performance across different devices and browsers.

wiki_catalogs.name: Live Chat Widget
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz live chat widget implementation. Detail the Floating Action Button (FAB) design with delayed entrance animation and toggle functionality. Explain the chat panel interface including message bubbles, user avatars, and timestamp formatting. Document the bot messaging system with intelligent responses based on keywords like 'course', 'admission', 'placement', and 'call'. Cover the typing indicator animation and message history management. Detail the quick reply functionality and user input handling including keyboard shortcuts. Explain the scroll management and auto-focus behavior when opening the chat panel. Include examples of the chat initialization process and event handling patterns used throughout the implementation.

wiki_catalogs.name: 3D Graphics Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Three.js 3D graphics integration in the Eduooz website. Explain the scene setup process, camera positioning, and renderer configuration. Document the creation and animation of healthcare-themed 3D objects including medical equipment, molecules, and geometric shapes. Detail the animation loop implementation, performance optimization strategies, and responsive 3D scene scaling. Include the integration between 3D animations and scroll-triggered effects. Provide examples of adding new 3D objects, customizing lighting and materials, and optimizing for mobile devices. Address the coordination between 3D scenes and UI elements, including z-index management and layering considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Key Features and Capabilities
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Eduooz key features and capabilities. Document the interactive 3D healthcare-themed background animations powered by Three.js, the glass morphism UI design system, and comprehensive course catalog with filtering functionality. Explain the testimonial carousel with YouTube video integration, faculty profiles showcasing international certifications, and placement results presentation. Detail the live chat widget for student support, newsletter subscription system, and responsive mobile-first design. Include the magnetic button interaction effects, scroll-triggered animations using GSAP, and seamless component-based architecture. Describe how these features work together to provide an engaging and effective educational platform for healthcare students.

wiki_catalogs.name: Interactive Course Showcase
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the interactive course showcase implementation. Explain the stacked card system with sticky positioning, parallax effects, and hover animations. Document the magnetic button effects including cursor interaction detection, deformation animations, and visual feedback systems. Detail the course card layout with image masking, gradient overlays, and feature highlight sections. Include the implementation of the liquid image mask technique and the glass photo overlay effects. Address the responsive behavior of course cards, touch interaction handling for mobile devices, and accessibility considerations for interactive elements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Course Detail Presentation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for course detail presentation and display mechanisms. Document the course card design system including image wrappers, content sections, and footer layouts. Explain the responsive grid implementation, course pricing display, and enrollment button styling. Detail the course description formatting, feature highlighting, and call-to-action button customization. Include examples of course card modifications, responsive design adjustments, and visual enhancement techniques. Address the integration between course data presentation and user interaction elements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Responsive Grid System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the custom vanilla CSS grid system implemented without external frameworks. Explain the container system with max-width constraints and percentage-based padding, the flexible row/column architecture using flexbox, and the breakpoint-based responsive classes (.col-md-6, .col-lg-6, .col-lg-5, .col-lg-7). Document the mobile-first approach with default 100% width columns and progressive enhancement for larger screens. Include concrete examples of grid layouts, alignment utilities (.align-items-center), and spacing controls. Detail the CSS Grid vs Flexbox decisions, performance implications of custom grid versus framework solutions, and best practices for maintaining responsive layouts across different screen sizes. Provide guidelines for extending the grid system with additional column classes and custom breakpoints.

wiki_catalogs.name: Scroll-Triggered Animations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the scroll-triggered animation system powered by GSAP ScrollTrigger. Explain the scroll-based animation triggers, viewport detection, and conditional animation execution. Document the ScrollTrigger configuration options including start/end positions, toggle actions, and scrubbing effects. Detail the integration with Lenis smooth scrolling, performance optimization through intersection observers, and responsive animation scaling. Include examples of section entrance animations, parallax effects, counter animations, and content reveal sequences. Address debugging techniques, performance monitoring, and cross-browser compatibility considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Magnetic Button Interaction Effects
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the magnetic button interaction system. Explain the mouse event handling for mouseenter, mousemove, and mouseleave events with bounding rectangle calculations. Document the mathematical transformation from mouse coordinates to button movement calculations including distance-based positioning and easing functions. Detail the requestAnimationFrame optimization for smooth animations and the cancelAnimationFrame cleanup process. Cover the GSAP integration for elastic and power-based easing effects. Include the responsive scaling considerations for different screen sizes and the performance impact of continuous mouse tracking. Address the active RAF cancellation system and memory leak prevention strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: External JavaScript Libraries
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the external JavaScript libraries integrated into the Eduooz platform. Document Three.js 0.160.0 WebGL graphics engine integration including 3D scene setup, healthcare-themed object creation, and performance optimization techniques. Explain GSAP 3.12.5 animation library usage for timeline management, scroll-triggered animations, and magnetic button effects. Detail Lenis smooth scrolling integration for enhanced user experience and scroll performance. Include comprehensive examples of library initialization, configuration options, and integration patterns with existing code. Address version compatibility management, update procedures, and dependency resolution strategies. Document performance impact assessment, bundle optimization, and lazy loading approaches for large libraries. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common integration issues, browser compatibility considerations, and fallback mechanisms for unsupported environments.

wiki_catalogs.name: Laboratory Technician Courses Implementation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for laboratory technician training programs including railway RRB lab assistant exams, DHS lab technician preparation, and specialized laboratory procedures. wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the Lenis smooth scrolling library integration. Include concrete examples of smooth scrolling setup, custom scroll behaviors, and responsive scroll optimization. wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive content for the responsive design implementation and performance optimization strategies. Detail the mobile-first approach with breakpoint-specific styling and component adaptations. Document the 3D graphics optimization techniques including resolution scaling, animation throttling, and device capability detection. Explain the lazy loading implementation for 3D scenes and heavy assets. Include the viewport meta tag configuration, touch interaction handling, and performance metrics collection. Address cross-browser compatibility testing, progressive enhancement strategies, and graceful degradation approaches for older browsers.

wiki_catalogs.name: Responsive Design and Performance Optimization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the responsive design implementation and performance optimization strategies. Explain the viewport-based camera positioning with different FOV settings for mobile, tablet, and desktop screens. Document the resize event handling with aspect ratio updates and renderer size adjustments. Detail the deferred Three.js initialization with 2.5-second delay to ensure main hero animations run smoothly. Cover the device pixel ratio optimization limiting performance impact on high-DPI displays. Include the intersection observer implementation for pausing animations when off-screen. Address the mobile-first approach with adjusted camera positions and reduced complexity. Explain the performance monitoring techniques and browser compatibility considerations for WebGL and 3D rendering.

wiki_catalogs.name: Course Catalog System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Eduooz course catalog system implementation. Thoroughly explain the specialty-based course organization including nursing coaching, pharmacist preparation, and laboratory technician training. Document the course filtering and categorization system, course detail presentation with comprehensive descriptions, and enrollment form integration. Include concrete examples of course data structures, filtering algorithms, and dynamic content rendering. Detail the course-specific pages for different specialties including DHS lab tech courses. Explain the responsive course card design, feature highlighting, and call-to-action elements. Address the integration between course listings and enrollment processes, including form validation and submission handling.

wiki_catalogs.name: Testimonial and Video System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz testimonial and video carousel system. Detail the YouTube video integration including playlist management, thumbnail generation, and video player customization. Explain the testimonial carousel functionality with infinite scrolling, responsive design, and touch interaction support. Document the video portal implementation with main video display, playlist navigation, and category filtering. Include technical details on YouTube API integration, video metadata extraction, and player state management. Provide examples of testimonial data structures, carousel animation implementation, and responsive breakpoint handling. Address accessibility considerations, performance optimization for video loading, and cross-platform compatibility for the video system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Faculty and Placement Showcase
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Eduooz faculty profiles and placement results showcase system. Thoroughly explain the faculty profile presentation including expert faculty member displays, international certifications, and achievement highlighting. Document the placement results system with alumni network visualization, international placement tracking, and success story presentation. Include concrete examples of data structures for faculty profiles, placement statistics, and alumni achievements. Detail the filmstrip carousel design for faculty showcase, prismatic card animations, and marquee scrolling effects. Explain the responsive design implementation for different screen sizes and the integration with placement tracking systems. Address the visual design elements including glass morphism effects, gradient overlays, and interactive hover states.

wiki_catalogs.name: Contact and Communication
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz contact and communication systems. Detail the contact form implementation including form validation, submission handling, and user feedback mechanisms. Explain the live chat widget functionality for student support, real-time interaction capabilities, and integration with customer service workflows. Document the newsletter subscription system including email collection, validation, and integration with email marketing platforms. Include technical details on form processing, error handling, and security considerations. Provide examples of contact form data structures, chat widget configuration, and newsletter signup implementation. Address the responsive design for mobile contact forms, accessibility compliance, and performance optimization for communication features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Styling Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Eduooz styling architecture and design system. Thoroughly explain the CSS custom properties system for theme management, color schemes, and design consistency across all pages. Document the glass morphism design implementation including frosted panel effects, gradient overlays, and transparency techniques. Detail the responsive grid system without external frameworks, media query strategies, and mobile-first design principles. Include concrete examples of CSS animations, keyframe implementations, and transition effects. Explain the typography system using Plus Jakarta Sans and Cormorant Garamond fonts, icon integration with Font Awesome, and Google Fonts implementation. Address performance optimization techniques, CSS organization patterns, and browser compatibility considerations for the advanced styling system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Animation System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz animation system powered by GSAP and Three.js. Detail the GSAP timeline management for coordinated animations, scroll-triggered effects, and performance optimization. Explain the magnetic button interaction effects including hover states, click animations, and responsive behavior. Document the scroll-based animation triggers, parallax effects, and content reveal sequences. Include technical details on animation sequencing, timing functions, and easing curves. Provide examples of timeline construction, animation chaining, and performance monitoring. Address the integration between GSAP animations and Three.js 3D scenes, responsive animation scaling, and fallback strategies for reduced motion preferences. Explain the animation performance optimization techniques and browser compatibility considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Build and Optimization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Eduooz build process and performance optimization strategies. Thoroughly explain the CSS cleaning and optimization process using the clean_css.js script, asset minification, and production deployment preparation. Document the performance monitoring techniques, bundle optimization, and loading performance improvements. Include concrete examples of build script configuration, optimization algorithms, and deployment workflows. Detail the asset management strategies including image optimization, font loading optimization, and resource compression. Explain the production deployment considerations, CDN integration, and caching strategies. Address the performance metrics collection, bottleneck identification, and continuous optimization approaches used in the build pipeline.

wiki_catalogs.name: Mobile Responsiveness
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Eduooz mobile responsiveness and touch interaction handling. Detail the responsive design principles including mobile-first approach, flexible grid systems, and adaptive layouts. Explain the mobile navigation implementation with hamburger menus, touch-friendly navigation elements, and gesture support. Document the touch interaction handling for mobile devices including swipe gestures, tap targets, and responsive button sizing. Include technical details on media query breakpoints, viewport configuration, and device-specific optimizations. Provide examples of responsive component adaptations, mobile animation adjustments, and touch event handling. Address performance considerations for mobile devices, battery optimization, and network efficiency. Explain the cross-device compatibility testing strategies and responsive debugging techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Third-party Integrations
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Eduooz third-party integrations and external service connections. Thoroughly explain the YouTube API integration for video carousel functionality, playlist management, and video player customization. Document the Font Awesome icon library usage, Google Fonts implementation, and typography services integration. Detail the external library management including Three.js 3D graphics engine, GSAP animation library, and Lenis smooth scrolling optimization. Include concrete examples of API integration patterns, service configuration, and error handling strategies. Explain the dependency management approach, version compatibility considerations, and update procedures for external libraries. Address security considerations for third-party scripts, performance impact assessment, and fallback mechanisms for external service failures.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# Eduooz International Academy - Educational Website Project

## Project Introduction

### Purpose Statement
Eduooz International Academy is a premier healthcare education platform designed to prepare students for competitive nursing, pharmacy, and laboratory technician examinations in India and internationally. The platform serves as both an online marketing website and educational resource hub.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- Provide comprehensive coaching for government healthcare examinations
- Establish Eduooz as India's leading healthcare coaching ecosystem
- Deliver premium educational content through innovative web technologies
- Support student placement in central, state, and international healthcare institutions

### Target Audience
- Nursing aspirants preparing for government exams (AIIMS, RRB, PSC)
- Pharmacist candidates for competitive examinations
- Laboratory technician students for professional certification
- International healthcare professionals seeking licensing (DHA, HAAD, NCLEX)

## Technical Architecture

### Component Breakdown

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Main Website] --> B[Header Component]
    A --> C[Content Sections]
    A --> D[Footer Component]
    
    B --> B1[Navigation Menu]
    B --> B2[Logo & Branding]
    
    C --> C1[Hero Section]
    C --> C2[Courses Catalog]
    C --> C3[Testimonials]
    C --> C4[Faculty Profiles]
    C --> C5[Placement Results]
    
    D --> D1[Social Links]
    D --> D2[Newsletter Signup]
    D --> D3[Legal Information]
```

### Design Patterns
- **Modular Component Architecture**: Reusable header, footer, and chat components
- **Glass Morphism Design**: Modern UI with frosted glass effects and transparency
- **Three.js Integration**: Interactive 3D healthcare-themed animations
- **GSAP Animation System**: Premium scroll-triggered animations and transitions
- **Mobile-First Responsive Design**: Adaptive layouts for all device sizes

### System Relationships

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    User[Website Visitor] --> Landing[Homepage]
    Landing --> Courses[Course Catalog]
    Landing --> About[About Us]
    Landing --> Contact[Contact Page]
    
    Courses --> CourseDetail[Individual Course Pages]
    CourseDetail --> Enquiry[Enquiry Form]
    
    About --> Faculty[Faculty Profiles]
    About --> Results[Placement Results]
    
    Contact --> Chat[Live Chat Widget]
    Contact --> Newsletter[Newsletter Signup]
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
- **Primary Homepage**: `index.html` - Features hero section with 3D animations and course showcase
- **Course Catalog**: `courses.html` - Comprehensive listing of all coaching programs
- **Secondary Pages**: `about.html`, `testimonials.html`, `placements.html`, `contact.html`

### Core Modules

#### Frontend Framework (`assets/js/index.js`)
- **GSAP Animation Engine**: Scroll-triggered entrance sequences and interactive elements
- **Three.js Integration**: Floating healthcare-themed 3D objects with realistic physics
- **Magnetic Button Effects**: Interactive hover animations with mouse tracking
- **Smooth Scrolling**: Lenis-based scroll optimization for premium experience

#### Styling Architecture (`assets/css/index.css`)
- **CSS Custom Properties**: Theme-based color system with dark/light mode support
- **Glass Morphism Effects**: Frosted glass panels with transparency and blur
- **Responsive Grid System**: Custom CSS grid without external frameworks
- **Animation Framework**: Keyframe animations for background elements

#### Component System (`components/`)
- **Header Component**: Navigation with responsive mobile menu
- **Footer Component**: Multi-column layout with newsletter signup
- **Chat Widget**: Interactive messaging interface

### Configuration Approach
- **Build Script**: `clean_css.js` - Automated CSS optimization removing unused sections
- **External Dependencies**: CDN-hosted libraries (GSAP, Three.js, Font Awesome)
- **Performance Optimization**: Deferred loading of heavy 3D animations

### External Dependencies
- **GSAP 3.12.5**: Advanced animation library for scroll-triggered effects
- **Three.js 0.160.0**: WebGL 3D graphics engine for interactive backgrounds
- **Font Awesome 6.5.1**: Vector icon library for healthcare-themed icons
- **Google Fonts**: Plus Jakarta Sans and Cormorant Garamond for typography

### Integration Points
- **YouTube Integration**: Video carousel for masterclass content
- **Social Media Links**: LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube channels
- **Newsletter System**: Email capture for lead generation
- **Live Chat**: Real-time student support functionality

### Component Relationship Diagram

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Header Component] --> B[Navigation Links]
    A --> C[Logo & Branding]
    
    D[Main Content] --> E[Hero Section]
    D --> F[Course Showcase]
    D --> G[Testimonial Carousel]
    D --> H[Faculty Profiles]
    
    I[Footer Component] --> J[Social Links]
    I --> K[Newsletter Form]
    I --> L[Legal Information]
    
    M[3D Animation Engine] --> N[Three.js Scene]
    M --> O[GSAP Timeline Control]
    
    E --> M
    F --> M
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview
- **Interactive 3D Background**: Floating medical equipment with realistic physics
- **Scroll-Triggered Animations**: Progressive content reveal during navigation
- **Magnetic Button Effects**: Interactive hover responses with mouse tracking
- **Glass Morphism Design**: Modern UI with transparency and depth effects
- **Multi-Specialty Course Catalog**: Organized by nursing, pharmacy, and lab technology

### Implementation Highlights

#### Hero Section (`index.html`)
- **Three.js Canvas**: Dynamic floating medical equipment (stethoscopes, capsules, test tubes)
- **GSAP Animations**: Staggered entrance sequences for hero elements
- **Responsive Design**: Optimized for mobile and desktop viewing

#### Course Showcase (`courses.html`)
- **Filter System**: Category-based course filtering (nursing, lab, pharma, german)
- **Grid Layout**: Responsive course cards with hover effects
- **Video Integration**: Testimonial videos with playlist functionality

#### Testimonial System (`testimonials.html`)
- **Carousel Interface**: Horizontal scrolling testimonial cards
- **Video Player**: Embedded YouTube videos with custom controls
- **Image Gallery**: Professional headshots with overlay effects

### Feature Architecture

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Loading
    Loading --> HeroAnimation: Page Load Complete
    HeroAnimation --> CourseSelection: User Interacts
    CourseSelection --> TestimonialView: View Details
    CourseSelection --> ContactForm: Get Enquiry
    TestimonialView --> CourseSelection: Back to Courses
    ContactForm --> CourseSelection: Thank You Message
    
    HeroAnimation --> Navigation: Scroll Down
    Navigation --> CourseSelection: Click Menu
    Navigation --> AboutSection: About Link
    Navigation --> ContactPage: Contact Link
```

The Eduooz website represents a sophisticated blend of educational content delivery and cutting-edge web technologies, creating an immersive learning experience that reflects the premium nature of healthcare education it provides.

**Sources:**
- [index.html](index.html)
- [components/header.html](components/header.html)
- [assets/js/index.js](assets/js/index.js)
- [courses.html](courses.html)
- [assets/css/index.css](assets/css/index.css)
- [clean_css.js](clean_css.js)
- [components/footer.html](components/footer.html)

</blog>
